meta.title: Dashboard UI Redesign: Cards, Navigation & Forms | IQ Rest
meta.description: IQ Rest dashboard redesigned with consistent card components, persistent sidebar navigation with active page highlighting, and improved form actions. Manage your restaurant QR menu with a cleaner, more intuitive interface.

content.intro: IQ Rest has undergone a comprehensive dashboard UI redesign. Every page now uses consistent card styling with unified border radii, a persistent sidebar navigation with accent-colored active states, and improved form pages with bottom save and delete actions. The result is a cleaner, more polished experience for managing your restaurant's digital QR menu.
content.image1Alt: Redesigned dashboard with consistent card styling
content.image1Caption: Unified card components across all dashboard pages
content.section1Title: Consistent Card Design Across All Pages
content.section1Text: Every dashboard page now uses a unified DashboardCard component with consistent rounded borders, subtle background colors, and optional section headers. Analytics, billing, settings, contacts, reservation settings, and all form pages share the same visual language. Hint labels with popover tooltips replace inline description text, keeping the interface clean while still providing helpful context when needed.
content.section2Title: Persistent Sidebar Navigation with Active States
content.section2Text: On desktop screens, a persistent sidebar navigation is now visible on every page. The active page is highlighted with an accent color background, making it immediately clear where you are. Sub-pages like categories, items, and orders correctly highlight the parent Menu item. The sidebar includes quick access to Menu, Print QR, Reservations, Analytics, Settings, Contacts, Billing, and Support — all without leaving the current view.
content.section3Title: Improved Form Pages with Bottom Actions
content.section3Text: All form pages — categories, items, tables, design, settings, contacts, and reservation settings — now feature a duplicate save button at the bottom in accent color. Delete buttons appear on the left side with a muted style. This means you no longer need to scroll back to the top to save your changes. The logout button has been moved from the sidebar to the bottom of the design page, keeping the navigation focused on essential actions.
content.benefit1: Unified card styling with consistent borders and backgrounds across all pages
content.benefit2: Persistent sidebar navigation on desktop with accent-colored active states
content.benefit3: Bottom save buttons on all forms — no need to scroll up to save
content.benefit4: Delete and save actions clearly separated — delete left, save right
content.benefit5: Section headers on form cards for better visual organization
content.benefit6: Cleaner analytics page with DashboardCard wrappers and improved device stats layout
content.conclusionText: This UI redesign brings visual consistency and improved usability to every corner of the IQ Rest dashboard. Whether you're editing menu items, checking analytics, or managing reservations, the interface feels cohesive and intuitive. Combined with the persistent sidebar navigation, managing your restaurant's digital QR menu is faster and more enjoyable than ever.

meta.description: Upload a photo of your paper menu and AI instantly creates a digital QR menu for your restaurant. Automatic dish extraction, AI background generation, and instant preview. The fastest way to create a QR menu.

content.intro: IQ Rest introduces the AI Menu Scanner — the fastest way to create a digital QR menu for your restaurant. Simply take a photo of your existing paper menu, and our AI technology extracts all dishes with names, descriptions, and prices. It even generates a professional background image for your restaurant website. What used to take hours of manual data entry now takes just minutes.
content.image1Alt: AI menu scanner creating digital QR menu from photo
content.image1Caption: Upload a photo of your paper menu and AI creates a complete digital QR menu
content.section1Title: How the AI Menu Scanner Creates Your Digital QR Menu
content.section1Text: The process is simple: open IQ Rest, tap the scanner on the homepage, and take a photo of your paper menu. Our AI analyzes the image, recognizes dish names, descriptions, and prices, and automatically creates categories with all items. The scanner supports menus in any language and handles various formats — from simple printed menus to handwritten chalkboards. Within minutes, your complete digital QR menu is ready to customize and publish.
content.section2Title: AI-Generated Backgrounds for Your Restaurant Website
content.section2Text: Along with extracting menu items, the AI Scanner generates a professional background image for your restaurant website. Based on your restaurant type and cuisine, it creates a visually appealing hero image that sets the right atmosphere. Combined with AI image optimization that automatically enhances and compresses dish photos, your digital QR menu looks professional from day one — no graphic designer needed.
content.section3Title: From Paper Menu to Digital QR Menu in Minutes
content.section3Text: The AI Menu Scanner transforms the onboarding experience for new restaurants. Instead of manually typing every dish, simply photograph your existing menu. The scanner handles the tedious data entry while you focus on customizing colors, adding translations, and sharing your QR code. We also send helpful reminder emails to guide you through the process, ensuring every restaurant gets the most out of their digital QR menu.

content.benefit2: AI generates professional background images for your restaurant website
content.benefit3: Supports menus in any language with automatic recognition
content.benefit4: Complete digital QR menu ready in minutes instead of hours
content.benefit5: Free AI translation trials included — translate your menu into 10+ languages
content.benefit6: Smart onboarding flow guides you from photo to published QR menu
content.conclusionTitle: Create Your Digital QR Menu from a Photo Today
content.conclusionText: Stop typing your menu by hand. With IQ Rest's AI Menu Scanner, creating a digital QR menu for your restaurant has never been easier. Take a photo, let AI do the work, customize your design, and share your QR code with customers. Join hundreds of restaurants that have already gone digital with IQ Rest.

meta.title: New Dashboard for Restaurant QR Menu Management | IQ Rest
meta.description: Completely redesigned restaurant dashboard with server-side rendering, instant page loads, and modern navigation. Manage your digital QR menu faster with the new IQ Rest control panel.

content.intro: IQ Rest has completely rebuilt the restaurant dashboard from the ground up. The new dashboard uses server-side rendering with Next.js file-based routing, delivering instant page loads and a smoother experience for managing your digital QR menu. Every page now loads with professional skeleton animations, and your menu data is prefetched on the server — so you see your categories, items, and settings immediately.
content.image1Caption: The new IQ Rest dashboard with faster navigation and modern design
content.section1Title: Server-Side Rendering for Instant QR Menu Management
content.section1Text: The previous dashboard loaded everything on the client side, causing delays. The new architecture prefetches your restaurant data on the server before the page even reaches your browser. Categories, menu items, tables, reservations, and analytics all load instantly. Each page has a dedicated loading skeleton so you never see a blank screen. This means managing your digital QR menu feels fast and responsive, even on slower connections.
content.section2Text: The dashboard now features unified page headers with consistent styling across all sections. Sort modes for categories, items, and tables have been redesigned with an intuitive interface. The sidebar navigation is cleaner, with Languages merged into Settings and Design renamed to Appearance. A new checklist banner on the home page shows your setup progress, helping new restaurants complete their digital QR menu configuration quickly.
content.section3Text: Every aspect of the new dashboard is optimized for mobile management. Sticky action buttons stay accessible as you scroll. Headers cast subtle shadows when scrolled to help with orientation. Browser back button navigation works reliably across all pages. Whether you're adding dishes between service or checking analytics on the go, managing your restaurant's digital QR menu from your phone is seamless.
content.benefit1: Server-side data prefetching — menu loads instantly without waiting
content.benefit2: Professional loading skeletons on every page for smooth transitions
content.benefit3: Unified page headers and consistent design language throughout
content.benefit4: Improved sort modes for categories, items, and tables
content.benefit5: Checklist banner showing setup progress for new restaurants
content.benefit6: Browser back button works correctly across all dashboard pages
content.conclusionText: The redesigned IQ Rest dashboard makes managing your restaurant's digital QR menu faster and more enjoyable. With server-side rendering, modern navigation, and mobile-first design, you can focus on what matters — creating a great menu for your customers. Log in now and experience the difference.
content.ctaText: Ready to try the new dashboard?

meta.title: Multi-Currency Pricing for Restaurant QR Menu Worldwide | IQ Rest
meta.description: IQ Rest now supports multi-currency pricing based on your location. Create a digital QR menu with plans priced in EUR, USD, GBP, PLN, and more. Automatic geo-detection for restaurants worldwide.

content.intro: IQ Rest now supports multi-currency pricing for restaurants worldwide. When you visit the pricing page, your country is automatically detected via Cloudflare geo-location, and prices are displayed in your local currency. Whether you're in Europe, the Americas, or Asia — you'll see plan prices in a currency that makes sense for your business. Creating a digital QR menu for your restaurant is now truly accessible globally.
content.image1Alt: Multi-currency pricing for restaurant QR menu
content.image1Caption: Pricing automatically adapts to your local currency based on geo-detection
content.section1Text: When you open IQ Rest, Cloudflare's global network identifies your country instantly. This information is used to select the most appropriate currency for your region — EUR for Europe, USD for the Americas, GBP for the UK, PLN for Poland, and many more. The system also detects your preferred language and redirects you to the localized version of the site. No manual currency switching needed — everything adapts automatically so you can focus on creating your digital QR menu.
content.section2Text: Plans are priced competitively in each currency with region-appropriate pricing. The Free plan remains free everywhere — create a digital QR menu with up to 500 scans per month at no cost. Growth and Pro plans show clean, rounded prices in your local currency. Yearly plans offer significant savings with nice round monthly equivalents. All prices include the same features regardless of currency — there are no regional feature restrictions.
content.section3Title: Seamless Stripe Checkout in Local Currency
content.section3Text: The entire payment flow works in your local currency. From the pricing page through Stripe checkout to invoices and the customer portal — everything displays consistent pricing. Switching between monthly and yearly billing updates prices in real-time with a smooth carousel interface. Restaurants worldwide can now create their digital QR menu and pay in the currency they're most comfortable with.

content.benefit2: Localized pricing in EUR, USD, GBP, PLN, and more currencies
content.benefit3: Free plan available worldwide — create a QR menu at no cost
content.benefit4: Clean rounded prices optimized for each currency
content.benefit5: Automatic language detection based on your country
content.benefit6: Consistent currency throughout checkout and billing portal
content.conclusionTitle: Create Your Digital QR Menu in Your Currency
content.conclusionText: With multi-currency support, IQ Rest makes creating a digital QR menu accessible to restaurants worldwide. No matter where your restaurant is located, you'll see pricing that feels right for your market. Visit the pricing page now and see plans in your local currency.

content.intro: We are excited to announce the launch of our new user authentication interface for IQ Rest. This update represents a significant step forward in making it easier than ever to create your restaurant website with a professional QR menu. Our goal has always been to help restaurant and cafe owners build their digital presence in minutes, not hours, and this new authentication system is designed with that mission in mind.
content.image1Alt: Email input step of IQ Rest authentication
content.image1Caption: Simple email-based authentication - no passwords to remember
content.section1Text: Understanding that restaurant owners are busy people, we've implemented a passwordless authentication system that requires only your email address. When you want to create your restaurant website or update your digital QR menu, simply enter your email and receive a secure 4-digit verification code. This approach eliminates the frustration of forgotten passwords while maintaining the highest security standards for your restaurant's data. The entire process takes less than 30 seconds, allowing you to focus on what matters most - running your restaurant and serving your customers.
content.section2Text: With our new authentication system, getting started with your digital QR menu has never been easier. Once authenticated, you'll have immediate access to our intuitive menu builder where you can add your dishes, set prices, upload photos, and organize categories. The QR menu you create will be accessible to your customers instantly - they simply scan the code and view your beautifully designed digital menu on their smartphone. No app downloads required for your customers, and no technical knowledge required from you. This is exactly what modern restaurants and cafes need to compete in today's digital-first world.
content.image2Alt: OTP verification step of IQ Rest authentication
content.image2Caption: Secure 4-digit code verification sent directly to your email
content.section3Text: Security was our top priority when designing this authentication system. Each verification code expires after 10 minutes and can only be used once, protecting your restaurant website and menu data from unauthorized access. At the same time, we've optimized every step of the process for speed. From entering your email to accessing your dashboard, the entire authentication flow completes in under a minute. This means you can make quick updates to your QR menu during service, add daily specials, or adjust prices - all without any delays.

questions.question: What is a QR menu for restaurant and how does it work?
questions.answer: A QR menu for restaurant is a digital menu that customers can access by scanning a QR code with their smartphone. IQ Rest creates a professional digital menu website for your restaurant or cafe that updates instantly without reprinting. Customers simply scan the code and view your menu on their device.

questions.question: How much does a QR menu cost for a restaurant or cafe?
questions.answer: IQ Rest offers flexible pricing starting from €0 forever with our free plan. This makes it affordable for any restaurant or cafe to create a professional QR menu. Paid plans start at just €4/month with additional features like unlimited items and advanced analytics.

questions.question: Can I create a website for my restaurant without coding?
questions.answer: Yes! IQ Rest is designed for restaurant and cafe owners without any technical knowledge. You can create a complete digital menu website for your restaurant in minutes, no programming or coding skills required. Simply add your dishes, prices, and photos through our intuitive interface.

questions.question: How often can I update my QR menu?
questions.answer: You can update your restaurant or cafe menu as often as you need. All changes are reflected in real-time, allowing you to instantly update prices, add new dishes, or change descriptions without reprinting physical menus. Perfect for daily specials and seasonal updates.

questions.question: Does the QR menu work for both restaurants and cafes?
questions.answer: Absolutely! IQ Rest is perfect for restaurants, cafes, coffee shops, bars, food trucks, and any food service business. Our digital menu solution adapts to any type of establishment, from small cafes to large restaurant chains.

questions.question: How does the automatic menu translation work?
questions.answer: Our QR menu system uses artificial intelligence to translate your restaurant or cafe menu into multiple languages automatically. This is perfect for tourist areas and international customers. You can offer your menu in English, Spanish, and other languages, helping you serve more customers.

questions.question: Can I try the QR menu solution for free?
questions.answer: Yes! We offer a completely free plan for restaurants and cafes to try IQ Rest. You can create your digital menu website with up to 15 items at no cost, forever. No credit card required to start. Upgrade only when you need more features.

questions.question: Is IQ Rest an app that customers need to download?
questions.answer: No! This is one of the best advantages. Customers don't need to download any app. They simply scan your QR code and the menu opens instantly in their web browser. This makes it much more convenient than restaurant apps that require downloads.

questions.question: What are the benefits of a digital menu website for my restaurant?
questions.answer: A digital menu website offers many benefits: instant menu updates without reprinting costs, multilingual support for international customers, contactless ordering for safety, analytics to see popular dishes, and professional presentation. Plus, it's eco-friendly as you eliminate paper menu waste.

questions.question: How do I create a QR code for my restaurant menu?
questions.answer: IQ Rest automatically generates a professional QR code when you create your digital menu. You can download and print this QR code for your restaurant tables, entrance, or takeout counter. The QR code is customizable and high-quality for clear scanning.

Amazon Web Services (Infrastructure): Hosts our servers and databases in EU regions. AWS complies with GDPR and is certified under EU-US Data Privacy Framework.
AI Service Providers: We use AI services for menu translations and image optimization. Data is processed in accordance with their privacy policies and data processing agreements.
Google Analytics: For anonymized website analytics (if enabled). You can opt out via cookie preferences.
We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We may disclose data if required by law or to protect our legal rights.

sections.title: 8. International Data Transfers
content: Your data is primarily stored and processed within the European Union (AWS Stockholm, eu-north-1 region). When data is transferred outside the EU (for example, to US-based service providers), we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, including Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) and certification under recognized data protection frameworks.

sections.title: 9. Data Retention
content: Account Data: Retained while your account is active. Upon account deletion, personal data is removed within 30 days, except where retention is required by law.
Menu Content: Retained while your account is active. Deleted upon account termination.
Payment Records: Retained for 7 years as required by Spanish tax law.
Analytics Data: Aggregated and anonymized data may be retained indefinitely for service improvement.
Backup Data: May be retained in encrypted backups for up to 90 days after deletion for disaster recovery purposes.

sections.title: 10. Your Rights Under GDPR
content: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
Right of Access: Request a copy of your personal data we hold.
Right to Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
Right to Erasure: Request deletion of your personal data ('right to be forgotten').
Right to Restriction: Request limitation of processing in certain circumstances.
Right to Data Portability: Receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
Right to Object: Object to processing based on legitimate interests or for direct marketing.
Right to Withdraw Consent: Where processing is based on consent, you may withdraw it at any time.

To exercise these rights, contact us at support@iq-rest.com. We will respond within 30 days. If you are unsatisfied with our response, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD) at www.aepd.es.

sections.title: 11. Children's Privacy
content: IQ Rest is not intended for use by individuals under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If we become aware that we have collected data from a child, we will delete it promptly.

sections.title: 12. Changes to This Policy
content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through a notice on our website. The 'Last updated' date at the top indicates when the policy was last revised.
Your continued use of IQ Rest after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

meta.title: Cookies Policy — IQ Rest
meta.description: Learn about how IQ Rest uses cookies on our restaurant QR menu platform.

contact.title: Questions About Cookies
contact.description: If you have any questions about our use of cookies, please contact us.

sections.title: 1. What Are Cookies
content: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile phone) when you visit a website. They help websites function properly, remember your preferences, and provide information to website owners.
This Cookies Policy explains how IQ Rest, operated by Bogdan Sokolov (Autónomo), uses cookies and similar technologies on our website iq-rest.com.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
content: We use cookies for several purposes: to ensure our website functions correctly, to remember your preferences and settings, to authenticate your account and keep you logged in, to analyze how visitors use our website so we can improve it, and to remember your cookie consent preferences.

sections.title: 3. Types of Cookies We Use
content: Essential Cookies: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They are usually set in response to actions you take, such as logging in or setting your privacy preferences.
Functional Cookies: These cookies enable enhanced functionality and personalization, such as remembering your language preference and theme settings.
Analytics Cookies: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. We use this data to improve our service.
Third-Party Cookies: Some cookies are placed by third-party services that appear on our pages, such as payment processors (Stripe) and analytics providers (Google Analytics).

sections.title: 4. Your Cookie Choices
content: When you first visit our website, you will see a cookie consent banner that allows you to accept or reject non-essential cookies. You can change your preferences at any time.

You can also control cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to refuse cookies, delete existing cookies, or be alerted when cookies are being sent. Please note that blocking essential cookies may affect the functionality of our website.
To opt out of Google Analytics tracking, you can install the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.

sections.title: 5. Cookie Duration
content: Session Cookies: These cookies are temporary and are deleted when you close your browser.
Persistent Cookies: These cookies remain on your device for a set period or until you delete them. They help us recognize you when you return to our website.

sections.title: 6. Third-Party Cookies
content: Stripe: Used for secure payment processing. Stripe may set cookies to prevent fraud and process payments securely. Learn more at stripe.com/cookies-policy
Google Analytics: Used to collect anonymous statistics about website usage. You can opt out using the cookie banner or browser settings. Learn more at policies.google.com/privacy

sections.title: 7. Updates to This Policy
content: We may update this Cookies Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. The 'Last updated' date at the top indicates when the policy was last revised.

steps.title: Enable Online Ordering

steps.title: Customers Place Orders
steps.description: Guests scan the QR code, browse your menu with photos and prices, select items, add notes, and submit their order. No app download or account creation needed.

steps.title: Manage Orders in Your Dashboard
steps.description: Orders appear instantly in your dashboard. Update each order's status from new to in progress to completed. You keep 100% of the revenue — zero commissions.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about online ordering.

items.question: Do I need any extra hardware or apps?
items.answer: No. Everything works through a web browser. Guests scan the QR code with their phone camera, and you manage orders from the IQ Rest dashboard on any device.

items.question: Are there any commissions or per-order fees?
items.answer: Absolutely not. IQ Rest never charges commissions on your orders. You pay only your subscription plan, and all revenue from orders stays with you.

items.question: Can customers customize their order or add notes?
items.answer: Yes. Guests can select items, specify quantities, and add special notes or requests. You can also require customer name, phone, or delivery address.

items.question: Does it work for dine-in, takeaway, and delivery?
items.answer: Yes. For dine-in, guests scan the QR code at their table. For takeaway or delivery, share a direct link to your menu. You can enable name, phone, and address fields as needed.

items.question: Can I send orders to WhatsApp instead of the dashboard?
items.answer: Yes. In your order settings, you can choose WhatsApp mode, dashboard mode, or both. WhatsApp orders are sent directly to your phone with all item details and customer info.

items.question: Do customers need to create an account to order?
items.answer: No. Guests scan the QR code and order immediately — no account, no app download, no sign-up. It works instantly in any phone browser.

items.question: Can I see which table placed the order?
items.answer: Yes. Each table has its own QR code, so every order arrives with the table number automatically attached. You always know exactly where the order came from.

items.question: Is online ordering available on the free plan?
items.answer: Online ordering is available on the Growth and Pro plans. The free plan includes your full QR menu, contact page, and analytics — upgrade anytime to enable orders.

steps.title: Enable Online Reservations
steps.description: Toggle reservations on in your restaurant settings. Choose between automatic confirmation, where bookings are approved instantly based on table availability, or manual mode where you review each request.

steps.title: Add Your Tables
steps.description: Create tables with capacity and zone information — for example, 'Table 5, 4 guests, Terrace'. Each table becomes bookable, and the table management system prevents double-bookings automatically.

steps.title: Set Working Hours
steps.description: Define your available hours for reservations and choose the slot duration — from 15 minutes to 8 hours. Only time slots within your working hours are shown to guests in the booking widget.

steps.description: Customers visit your restaurant page, pick their date, time, and party size, enter their name and phone, and submit. No account or app download required — the white-label booking system works in any browser.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the restaurant reservation system.

items.question: Do customers need to create an account to book?
items.answer: No. Guests simply fill in their name, phone number, party size, and preferred time. No account or app download required — the restaurant booking widget is designed for instant access.

items.question: Can I set available time slots and table capacity?
items.answer: Yes. Define your working hours, reservation slot duration, and table capacity. The table management system only shows available slots to guests.

items.question: Will I get notified when someone books?
items.answer: Yes. You receive an email for every new reservation. Guests also get a confirmation email once you approve the booking through the dashboard.

items.question: Can I use both automatic and manual confirmation?
items.answer: Yes. Choose automatic mode to confirm bookings instantly based on availability, or manual mode to review and approve each request yourself — the restaurant reservation software supports both workflows.

items.question: How does the system prevent double bookings?
items.answer: Each table has a defined capacity and time slots. Once a table is booked for a specific time, it's no longer shown as available. The cloud-based reservation system handles all conflict detection automatically.

items.question: Can guests add special requests or notes?
items.answer: Yes. The reservation form includes a notes field where guests can mention dietary needs, celebrations, seating preferences, or any other requests.

items.question: Is the restaurant reservation SaaS available on the free plan?
items.answer: Table reservations are available on the Growth and Pro plans. The free plan includes your full QR menu, contact page, and analytics — upgrade anytime to enable online reservations.

items.question: Can I see reservation history?
items.answer: Yes. All reservations — past and upcoming — are stored in your dashboard. You can filter by date, status, and table to review your booking history at any time.
